title: 10 health benefits of Pergularia extensa (devil's claw)
intro: Pergularia extensa has health benefits such as pain relief and anti-inflammatory properties, attributed to its unique composition of iridoid glycosides. These compounds work by reducing swelling and relieving joint pain, making it a natural remedy for arthritis sufferers. As a result, people can experience improved mobility, reduced stiffness, and enhanced quality of life. Additionally, devil's claw's ability to relax the muscles can also alleviate headaches and migraines, providing welcome relief from debilitating symptoms.
